description: The Native Mob is a Native American street gang founded in the 1990s in Minneapolis, Minnesota. It is one of the largest and most violent Native American gangs in the U.S., active in Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado, and South Dakota. The gang engages in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, and murder, with an estimated 200 members as of 2021. Members have been placed on the FBI most wanted list in 2025.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Native Mob is one of the largest and most violent Native American gangs in the U.S. and is notoriously active in Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado, and South Dakota.
country_links.context: The Native Mob is active in multiple U.S. states including Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado, and South Dakota, where it operates and traffics drugs.
